title: Implement secretx-ibm-sm backend
description: Implement the IBM Cloud Secrets Manager backend. Stub README exists at secretx-ibm-sm/README.md. URI: secretx:ibm-sm:<region>/<instance-id>/<secret-id>. Auth via IBMCLOUD_API_KEY. IBM Cloud SM is HashiCorp Vault Enterprise hosted/operated by IBM; exposes its own v2 REST API, not the Vault API. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore. For IBM HPCS HSM signing, secretx-pkcs11 is the correct backend (separate scope).
